people.person: a group of young people, including a girl with red hair in the center

scene.setting: a long, dimly lit, stone corridor with wooden railings on both sides, under an arched ceiling.

key_actions: a person is seen falling through the air
a large piece of debris crashes down, sending wood splinters flying
a group of people walks towards the camera down a long corridor.

audio_description: The audio begins with a loud, high-pitched scream, followed by a heavy thud and crashing sounds.
